race.description: Become A Brc Member Bm78 Handicap
race.comment: Very open race. CHEVAL CHIC (12) settled rearwards from a wide draw then stoked up late to get within half a length of SAVAGERY VIBE when they met here at this trip a fortnight ago. That followed a one-month let-up so she should improve. Can race closer from the inside draw and this looks a nice race for her to break a long win drought. FLYING DESTINY (2) led and pulled out all stops but was overwhelmed in the shadows in a similar race here four weeks ago. Cherry ripe at the third run back and the blinkers going on suggests he is peaking. SAVAGERY VIBE (11) was ridden cold as usual then unleashed late to score an impressive win here at today's journey recently. Settling in now under Gollan and is a major player once again. LOST HIS BEANS (5) caught the eye late first-up at Doomben - will enjoy the longer run home today.
